agents.task_title: Fix SmithingTemplateItems.kt constructor arity version gating
acceptance_criteria: SmithingTemplateItem constructor call is stonecutter-gated by version: 7-arg form (no Item.Properties) for 1.20.1; verified correct arg form for 1.21.1; 8-arg form with Item.Properties for >=1.21.2
./gradlew chiseledBuild passes on all 5 versions (1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.11, 26.1.2) with no unresolved-reference errors in this file
The LootTableEvents.MODIFY lambda is stonecutter-gated: 3-param form for 1.20.1 and 1.21.1; 4-param form for versions where it supplies 4 params
The LootTableEvents import is stonecutter-gated: >=26.1.2 uses new qualified import path; older versions keep loot.v2
The builder.pool(LootPool.lootPool()...build()) injection block is stonecutter-gated for 1.20.1 using the correct 1.20.1 loot builder API
key.location().toString() is stonecutter-gated: split >=1.21.1 into >=1.21.1 <1.21.11 (using .location()) and >=1.21.11 (renamed method)
./gradlew chiseledBuild passes on all 5 versions with no unresolved-reference errors in this file
registerWanderingTraderOffers call is stonecutter-gated: split >=1.21.1 into >=1.21.1 <1.21.11 (with Int level argument) and >=1.21.11 (without level argument)
TradeOfferHelper import is stonecutter-gated: >=26.1.2 uses new import path; older versions keep v1 path
The 1.20.1 stonecutter block uses VillagerTrades.ItemListing (not TradeListing) with correct MerchantOffer constructor
./gradlew chiseledBuild passes on all 5 versions with no unresolved-reference errors in this file

agents.task_title: Canonicalize recipe tag/item-ref formats across recipe JSON
acceptance_criteria: All recipe files referencing tags use "#c:..." string-prefix form (no { "tag": "c:..." } object form anywhere in data/dndweapons/recipe/)
All 56 smithing_transform recipes use a single canonical item-ref format for template/base/result fields compatible with all 5 MC versions
./gradlew chiseledBuild passes with no recipe parse errors on all 5 versions
./gradlew chiseledRunGametest passes with no recipe-related failures

agents.task_title: Make SmithingGametest simulate in-world smithing craft
acceptance_criteria: runDiamondPreservesSpec helper performs an in-world smithing craft simulating SmithingTransformRecipe with longsword + diamond_weapon_upgrade_template + diamond ingredient

Obtain output ItemStack from simulated craft and assert: item id matches longsword_diamond, attackDamage = base spec attackDamage + Tier.DIAMOND.damageBonus, baseDurability = 1561, relevant properties (VERSATILE etc.) preserved
Test method smithingDiamondUpgradePreservesSpec continues to pass on all 5 versions
Also fix wave-5-agent-2-bug-2: AssertionError message uses Tier.DIAMOND.damageBonus instead of literal 1
./gradlew chiseledRunGametest passes with 13 mod tests per version
